block_01: Whether we like it or not, losing is a part of trading. All traders lose from time to time — some lose more, some lose less. However, when you lose more than you earn, there is a problem. Here is a collection of 5 tips that can help you break the vicious cycle of losing.
block_02: Do your emotions affect your trading decisions? If the answer is yes, your capital might be at risk. Are you still looking for the ultimate trading strategy (or even worse, try to trade with a robot)? If the answer is yes, then this might be the reason, as well.
block_03: What are the other three factors that contribute to your losses? Read the full article to learn how to spot and fight them.
